'''palutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetoglobosin|chaetoglobosin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetoglobosin|chaetoglobosin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| palutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pælitith|pælitith]] || [[word:pælitij|pælitij]] || [[word:pælitish|pælitish]] || [[word:pæliti|pæliti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:palulututh|palulututh]] || [[word:palulutuj|palulutuj]] || [[word:palulutush|palulutush]] || [[word:palulutu|palulutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:palututh|palututh]] || [[word:palutuj|palutuj]] || [[word:palutush|palutush]] || [[word:palutu|palutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:paluftuth|paluftuth]] || [[word:paluftuj|paluftuj]] || [[word:paluftush|paluftush]] || [[word:paluftuf|paluftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:palututhu|palututhu]] || [[word:palutuju|palutuju]] || [[word:palutushu|palutushu]] || [[word:palutuku|palutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:palututh|palututh]] || [[word:palutuj|palutuj]] || [[word:palutush|palutush]] || [[word:palutu|palutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:palututhul|palututhul]] || [[word:palutujul|palutujul]] || [[word:palutushul|palutushul]] || [[word:palutukul|palutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:palututhuthu|palututhuthu]] || [[word:palutujuju|palutujuju]] || [[word:palutushushu|palutushushu]] || [[word:palutuku|palutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:palututhun|palututhun]] || [[word:palutujun|palutujun]] || [[word:palutushun|palutushun]] || [[word:palutukun|palutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:palututhuoro|palututhuoro]] || [[word:palutujuoro|palutujuoro]] || [[word:palutushuoro|palutushuoro]] || [[word:palutukuoro|palutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
